Course Details
Curriculum & Outcomes
03
What You'll Learn
Course Curriculum
Phase 1
Advanced Excel
Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, Power Query, Conditional Formatting, Data Validation, Macros
Phase 2
SQL for Data Analysis
Database basics, SELECT/JOIN/GROUP BY, Subqueries, Window Functions, Stored Procedures, MySQL Workbench
Phase 3
Python for Analytics
Pandas, NumPy, data cleaning, merging, reshaping, EDA, Matplotlib & Seaborn visualizations
Phase 4
Statistics for Data
Descriptive & Inferential Statistics, Probability, Hypothesis Testing, Correlation, Regression Analysis
Phase 5
Power BI
Data modeling, DAX formulas, interactive dashboards, Power Query, report publishing & sharing
Phase 6
Tableau & Capstone
Tableau Desktop, calculated fields, storytelling with data, ETL basics, end-to-end business case projects
🎯 Who Should Join
  • Commerce / MBA students & freshers
  • Business analysts wanting BI skills
  • Excel users moving to Power BI
  • IT professionals entering data field
  • Anyone wanting data-driven careers
🏆 Career Outcomes
  • Data Analyst
  • Business Intelligence Analyst
  • BI Developer (Power BI / Tableau)
  • MIS Executive
  • SQL / Reporting Analyst
